Within the strip of woods off the road, just past the line of mailboxes. The erect, thorned canes droop over the periphery of the patch and are quite noticeable during the summer. Access: Private but overhanging.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.

This entire area has trails all through it, and is used by locals as a hiking or dog walking spot. It is also littered with wild fruit bushes. I have not personally seen any true raspberry here, but there is black raspberry, as well as trailing blackberry and
